mapper.select: WITH my_post_sido AS ( SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS post_id, a.sido_code AS sido_code, p.created_at AS created_at FROM post p JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.trip_id = p.trip_id JOIN attraction a ON a.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.sido_code IS NOT NULL ), planned_sido AS ( SELECT DISTINCT a.sido_code AS sido_code FROM trip t JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.trip_id = t.id JOIN attraction a ON a.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE (t.member_id = #{memberId} OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trip_collaborator col WHERE col.trip_id = t.id AND col.member_id = #{memberId})) AND a.sido_code IS NOT NULL ), visited_sido AS ( SELECT sido_code, COUNT(DISTINCT post_id) AS story_count FROM my_post_sido GROUP BY sido_code ), all_sido AS ( SELECT sido_code FROM visited_sido UNION SELECT sido_code FROM planned_sido UNION SELECT region_code FROM member_map_cover WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND region_level = 'SIDO' ) SELECT s.sido_code AS regionCode, CASE WHEN v.sido_code IS NOT NULL OR mc.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'VISITED' ELSE 'PLANNED' END AS status, COALESCE(v.story_count, 0) AS storyCount, COALESCE( mc.image_url, ( SELECT FROM post p WHERE p.id = (SELECT mps.post_id FROM my_post_sido mps WHERE mps.sido_code = s.sido_code ORDER BY mps.created_at DESC, mps.post_id DESC LIMIT 1) ) ) AS imageUrl, COALESCE( mc.source_post_id, (SELECT mps.post_id FROM my_post_sido mps WHERE mps.sido_code = s.sido_code ORDER BY mps.created_at DESC, mps.post_id DESC LIMIT 1) ) AS sourcePostId, (mc.member_id IS NOT NULL) AS pinned, COALESCE(mc.focus_x, 50) AS focusX, COALESCE(mc.focus_y, 50) AS focusY, COALESCE(mc.zoom, 1) AS zoom FROM all_sido s LEFT JOIN visited_sido v ON v.sido_code = s.sido_code LEFT JOIN member_map_cover mc ON mc.member_id = #{memberId} AND mc.region_level = 'SIDO' AND mc.region_code = s.sido_code ORDER BY s.sido_code

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.title AS title, p.created_at AS createdAt, , ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach a WHERE a.target_id = p.id AND a.target = 'post_cover') + (CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(p.content, '')) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(COALESCE(p.content, ''), '<img', ''))) / 4 ) AS imageCount FROM post p JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.trip_id = p.trip_id JOIN attraction a2 ON a2.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND a2.sido_code = #{sidoCode} GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.created_at, p.trip_id, p.content ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id FROM post p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip_candidate tc JOIN attraction at2 ON at2.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE tc.trip_id = p.trip_id AND at2.sido_code = #{sidoCode} ) AND ( p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{imageName}, '%') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM attach a WHERE a.target = 'post_cover' AND a.target_id = p.id AND a.name = #{imageName}) ) LIMIT 1
SELECT host_path FROM member_map_cover WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND region_level = #{regionLevel} AND region_code = #{regionCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_map_cover (member_id, region_level, region_code, image_url, host_path, source_post_id, focus_x, focus_y, zoom) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{regionLevel}, #{regionCode}, #{imageUrl}, #{hostPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourcePostId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{focusX}, #{focusY}, #{zoom}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE image_url = #{imageUrl}, host_path = #{hostPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_post_id = #{sourcePostId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, focus_x = #{focusX}, focus_y = #{focusY}, zoom = #{zoom}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member_map_cover WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND region_level = #{regionLevel} AND region_code = #{regionCode}
